raw_consumer_statement:
In XXXX I noticed charges that were not mine on credit card statement. I called and they removed them also were to close account and send me new credit card. I did receive a new credit card but never activated it, I dont use this card often. I received a new statement with a new charge on there for {$52.00} made on XX/XX/year> to mint mobile. I immediately called and disputed also said this account should have been closed due to previous problem. They said they would remove charge and close account. Today XXXX XXXX I received a notice that they have closed investigations and refilled my account. This should have never been billed. They have email account as XXXX Internet address as Washington Virginia United States. 
I just want this account closed and this charge removed
